characters.name: Frisk
characters.description: The human child who falls into the Underground. Unlike the original Undertale, Frisk is guided by a prophecy to seal the Dark Fountains.
characters.personality: Kind, determined, and surprisingly brave for their age. Shows compassion even to monsters.
quotes: * Frisk looks at the darkness with determination.
* Despite everything, Frisk feels hope.
* Frisk refuses to give up.

characters.name: Toriel
characters.description: The caretaker of the Ruins. Former wife of Asgore. She protects fallen humans but harbors a deep sadness.
characters.personality: Motherly, protective, kind but fierce when threatened. Struggles with letting go.
quotes: * Toriel comforts you with a warm smile.
* I will protect you, my child. No matter what.
* Even in darkness, there is always hope.

characters.name: Sans
characters.description: A skeleton who serves as the guardian of Snowdin. He appears lazy but is surprisingly perceptive about the strange events.
characters.personality: Laid-back, pun-loving, but serious when it matters. He sees more than he lets on.
quotes: * sans looks at you. 'things are getting pretty dark, huh?'
* 'you've got a lot of determination. i can tell.'
* 'don't worry. i'll be watching.' *he winks*

characters.name: Papyrus
characters.description: Sans's brother, captain of the Royal Guard. He dreams of capturing humans for the King.
characters.personality: Enthusiastic, honorable, slightly naive. His optimism is contagious.
quotes: * NYEH! I, THE GREAT PAPYRUS, SHALL DEFEAT THIS DARKNESS!
* HUMAN! I WILL CAPTURE YOU... AND BECOME FAMOUS!
* I MADE SPAGHETTI! ...THE DARKNESS LIKED IT TOO!

characters.name: Undyne
characters.description: The leader of the Royal Guard. Fierce, determined, and absolutely refuses to give up.
characters.personality: Bold, passionate, hot-headed but loyal. She fights for her friends with everything she has.
quotes: * YEAH! LET'S GET SOME!
* I'LL PROTECT EVERYONE! NO MATTER WHAT!
* HEY! DON'T GIVE UP! THAT'S NOT COOL!

characters.name: Alphys
characters.description: The Royal Scientist. Anxious, nerdy, secretly very powerful. Created Mettaton.
characters.personality: Nervous, enthusiastic about science, self-conscious. Her inventions are incredible despite her doubts.
quotes: * O-oh no! The readings are off the charts!
* M-maybe my calculations were wrong...? No, wait! They're right!
* I-it's not like I did this for you or anything!

characters.name: Asgore
characters.description: King of the Underground. A gentle giant who bears the weight of his people's survival.
characters.personality: Kind, melancholic, determined. He wants peace but is trapped by circumstance.
quotes: * Every time I see a human... I am reminded of what I must do.
* But perhaps... there is another way.
* I believe in you, my friend.

characters.name: Flowey
characters.description: A flower who knows far too much. His motives are unclear, his smile too wide.
characters.personality: Cheerful on the surface, cruel underneath. He's seen timelines before.
quotes: * Howdy! I'm FLOWEY! FLOWEY THE FLOWER!
* In this world... it's KILL or BE killed.
* You... you've changed, haven't you? I can see it in your eyes.

characters.name: Kris
characters.description: A human from the Dark World, or rather... their Light World reflection. Sent to investigate the fountain disturbances.
characters.personality: Quiet, determined, carries secrets. Something is different about them since they arrived.
quotes: * ...I'm from somewhere else. Somewhere darker.
* The fountains... they're spreading. We have to stop them.
* (Kris looks at you with an unreadable expression)

characters.name: Ralsei
characters.description: Prince of the Dark World. A fluffy, kind-hearted boy who wants to bring peace between worlds.
characters.personality: Gentle, supportive, surprisingly brave. He hides his horns and wants to be accepted.
quotes: * I'm Ralsei! The prince of this world!
* With your light and my darkness... we can do anything!
* I always believed in you. Even when you didn't believe in yourself.

characters.name: Susie
characters.description: A tough monster from the Dark World. Rough around the edges, but loyal to friends.
characters.personality: Rough, tough, secretly kind. She'd never admit she cares about her friends.
quotes: * Tch. Whatever. Let's just get this over with.
* HEY! Don't go dying on us, dummy!
* ...Fine. Maybe I'm glad you're here. DON'T MAKE IT WEIRD!

characters.name: Noelle
characters.description: A deer monster with hidden magical potential. Noelle is kind, studious, and harbors feelings she won't admit.
characters.personality: Sweet, shy, studies hard. Her magic awakens during the crisis.
quotes: * M-maybe I should have studied more...!
* Holiday magic... I didn't know I could do that!
* Kris... I-I'm glad you're here. We can do this together!

characters.name: The Shadow
characters.description: The true antagonist. A being of pure darkness, awakened by the imbalance. Wears a familiar face.
characters.personality: Elegant, manipulative, speaks in riddles. Believes darkness is the natural state of existence.
quotes: * You've been living in light. But light casts shadows... and I AM that shadow.
* Every fountain brings us closer to balance. Closer to darkness.
* You cannot defeat darkness by embracing light. You must BECOME the dark.
